title: Immortal│不朽
description: When an Evoker is spawned, it possesses a Immortal Shield, which is equivalent to the Totem of Undying.│喚魔者生成時，它會獲得不朽之盾，相當於不死圖騰的效果。
body:
# Function│功能
When an Evoker spawns, it has an Immortal Shield. When the Evoker takes fatal damage, the Immortal Shield will disappear and trigger the same effect as the Totem of Undying.│喚魔者生成時自帶一層不朽之盾，當喚魔者受到致死傷害時，不朽之盾將會消失，並觸發與不死圖騰相同的效果。
